narrative:
Lisbon Ex Vill Sd (Columbiana) exempted village school district has 3,473 registered voters, with 60.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.8 percentage points.
